mapper.select:
select q.id, q.title, u.name as manager, q.is_public from question q join user u on u.id = q.creator_id where q.creator_id = #{userId} and q.parent_id = 0 and q.is_deleted = 0
and (q.title like concat('%', #{content}, '%') or q.content like concat('%', #{content}, '%'))

select q.id, t.name from question q left join question_tag qt on qt.question_id = q.id join tag t on t.id = qt.tag_id where q.id in
#{id}
